/* Generated by EPP 1.0beta3 (by lisp-epp1.0beta3) */

class TestPComp {
  public static void main(String[] argv){
    int w = 0, x = 0, y = 1, z = 2; 
    System.out.println((w) <= (x)); 
    int _T0; 
    System.out.println(((w) <= (_T0 = (x))) && ((_T0) < (y))); 
    int _T1; 
    int _T2; 
    System.out.println((((w) <= (_T2 = (x))) && ((_T2) < (_T1 = (y)))) && ((_T1) < (z))); 
    int _T3; 
    int _T4; 
    System.out.println((((w) <= (_T4 = (x ++))) && ((_T4) < (_T3 = (y)))) && ((_T3) < (z))); 
    int _T5; 
    int _T6; 
    System.out.println(!((((w) <= (_T6 = (x))) && ((_T6) < (_T5 = (y)))) && ((_T5) < (z)))); 
    }
  }
